common.subtitle: An AI execution tool crafted for INTP-style deep thinkers

hero.title: Turn thoughts into action
hero.subtitle: For INTPs: execution is not willpower, it's being asked the right questions.

socratic.title: Socratic dialogue
socratic.desc: Gentle AI inquiry to clarify your intent

plan.title: One-click plan
plan.desc: From milestones to today's first step

capture.title: Capture
capture.desc: Hit ⌘K, drop a messy thought. No naming, no tagging, no folders.

refine.title: Dialogue
refine.desc: AI asks through four phases — intent, detail, boundary, ready. One question at a time, no fluff.

plan.title: Plan
plan.desc: Turns the dialogue into a visible plan tree: goal, first action, milestones, tasks, risks, MoSCoW priorities.

focus.title: Execute
focus.desc: Pick today's few from the tree. Run a pomodoro. Tick them off.

review.title: Review
review.desc: One click on Sunday to see what you did, where you stalled, and what to focus next week.

byok.a: No. Built-in Demo Key gives every new user 20 free calls per day — enough to run a full idea through the flow. Configure your own API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Kimi, Doubao, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) for unlimited use on your own bill.

privacy.q: Are my keys and data safe?
privacy.a: Keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before hitting the database. Master key lives in server env vars only. Ideas, messages and plans stay under your account. Code is MIT-licensed — self-host for full control.

selfhost.a: Yes. A single docker-compose file spins up the full stack (PostgreSQL + Redis + Next.js + Nginx). Your server, your domain, your keys, zero external dependencies.

free.a: The code is MIT-licensed and free forever. The hosted version is free for now; AI cost is covered by BYOK.

selfhost.title: Self-host in 5 minutes
selfhost.desc: One docker-compose. One .env.prod. Your ECS, your domain, your keys.

inbox.title: Idea Inbox
inbox.empty: Quiet here. Press ⌘K to capture your first thought.

focus.empty: No tasks today. Check the Inbox.

quota.exhausted: You've used all free calls for today
quota.configureKey: Configure your own API key for unlimited use
